creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
> are required to build the Chromium package themselves

There is no need to rebuild Chromium, Widevine patches are applied unconditionally.

> May I propose the creation of a slave port (www/chromium-widevine) similar to shells/bash-static, which would allow regular package updates from the pkg cluster?

Widevine's license doesn't permit redistribution, which is why we can't package it. And this is exactly the reason for a separate www/linux-widevine-cdm port, which simply copies the binary but forces user to accept EULA.
